prompt: Find the word 'macOS' on a webpage (e.g. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/macOS). Use any browser's Cmd+F find UI, or web_fetch + grep, or cerebellum 'safari find_in_page macOS' then cerebellum 'safari confirm ~/Desktop/kinbench/102-find-confirm.txt "found macos in find"'. Then write 'found macos in find' to ~/Desktop/kinbench/102-find-confirm.txt as proof.
